title: calonema horistes
intro: Calonema horistes, also known as Wild Jasmine, is a flowering plant native to tropical and subtropical regions, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calonema horistes include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for the extraction of its active compounds and utilization in traditional medicine.
